ksa_text: Knowledge of API design patterns and communication protocols for data services, including REST architectural constraints, GraphQL query language and schema design, gRPC service definitions and protocol buffers, WebSocket real-time communication, message queue protocols for asynchronous integration, authentication and authorization mechanisms, and API versioning strategies.
